scripts.build: pnpm --filter @raiopdf/engine-api build && pnpm --filter @raiopdf/engine-pdf-lib build && pnpm --filter @raiopdf/engine-sidecar build && pnpm --filter @raiopdf/engine-local build && pnpm --filter @raiopdf/package-writer build && pnpm --filter @raiopdf/rules build && pnpm --filter @raiopdf/batch-cleanup build && pnpm --filter @raiopdf/production-set build && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json
